utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Each one includes the relevant details: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health insurance with descriptions and costs; property_coverage lists home/contents insurance (in this case, photography equipment and related protections) with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details and cost; additional_services includes enhancement services with their inclusions; total_budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are fully specified according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes three main categories that correspond to ground-truth sections: (1) health_coverage → primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health); (2) property_coverage → property_protection (home_content, which includes photography equipment and liability protection); (3) travel_coverage → mobility_coverage (travel_insurance). The additional_services section contains wellness_programs, telemedicine, emergency_support (24/7 multilingual assistance), and executive_health_programs, which align with health_enhancement_services (Wellness Programs, Telemedicine Services, Emergency Mental Health Care). By matching the features described in the final plan to the best-rated ground-truth entries, we identify the following correspondences:

- Physical health: 'Full coverage including preventive care, prescriptions, and specialist access within one week' best matches LifeFirst Standard Plan (low deductible, strong preventive and specialist access) → rating 9.
- Mental health: 'Included (therapy, crisis intervention, psychiatry, stress management)' matches CareCo Basic Plan (includes therapy, crisis intervention, affordable) → rating 10.
- Property coverage (photography equipment, liability, natural disaster): best match 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (covers business equipment and electronics) → rating 10.
- Travel coverage (adventure sports, evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage, delays): best match 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (comprehensive adventure coverage) → rating 10.
- Additional services: 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), 'Telemedicine' (Telemedicine Services) (rating 10), 'Emergency Support (24/7 multilingual assistance)' closest to 'Emergency Mental Health Care' (24/7 crisis support) (rating 6), 'Executive Health Programs' corresponds to 'Preventive Care Package' (executive health assessments) (rating 4).
